matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Royal Ontario Museum

node.name: Royal Ontario Museum
node.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario

node.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
node.description: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Ripley's Aquarium

node.name: Ripley's Aquarium
node.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 4 > Full-Day Workshop

node.name: Full-Day Workshop
node.description: Intensive all-day work workshop with the entire team. Exhausting but productive session covering project roadmap and deliverables.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 2 > Strategy Workshop

node.name: Strategy Workshop
node.description: Intensive afternoon workshop session with the team. Long work hours in conference room. Mentally draining but productive.
